justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes. AC5 idempotency is explicitly distinct from AC2 conflict check — short-circuits before findByEmail. No external validation library (uses inline regex). Tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit test names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to named tests. files_changed lists handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly short-circuits before both findByEmail and updateEmail, clearly distinct from AC2
Guard ordering explicitly tested (AC3 format check fires before AC4 user lookup)
AC3 uses inline regex, no external library
All 5 ACs have dedicated describe blocks with explicit test names
Error codes present in responses (EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, USER_NOT_FOUND)
Parametrized invalid-email cases cover edge cases including null/undefined
